title: Noclip
description: A mod for Minecraft rd-132211 that adds flight, speed boost, and noclip.
body: This mod is designed for the very first Minecraft version, rd-132211. It allows the player to fly, increases movement speed, and enables noclip mode when pressing the Q key. With this mod, you can freely explore the world without restrictions, pass through blocks, and move much faster than usual, making it easier to navigate and experiment within the game.
